$comment: Fictional editorial desks for the living newsroom (docs/dev/newsroom-history-overhaul.md D6). Parsed by Companion.Core.Newsroom.NewsDesks. A story's desk is rendezvous-assigned over the desks that prefer its category (generalists catch the rest), so the same story always carries the same masthead. Ids are stable data-format keys - never rename.

desks.name: Grid Wire
desks.tone: straight news wire - fast, factual, no flourish

desks.name: The Slipstream
desks.tone: serious weekly motorsport magazine - considered, human, long memory

desks.name: Apex Technical Review
desks.tone: technical journal - engineering first, verdicts second

desks.name: Paddock Whispers
desks.tone: paddock rumor column - sourced gossip, clearly labeled, never certain

desks.name: The Archive Desk
desks.tone: historical review - context, anniversaries, the long view

desks.name: Title Watch
desks.tone: championship analysis desk - the points table is the story
